rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDITH MCMILLAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/27/17. Examiner needs more time to review legal authority re reformation of will/testamentary trust. Examiner notes that: 1. waivers of accounting were filed; if Petitioner wishes to petition for distribution on waiver of account, the petition must be amended; 2. if trust law is applicable (or if the Court requires it per Sec. 1202), petitioner must file a supplement naming the remainder beneficiaries of the trust - Edith's heirs-at-law if Matthew were to die today.
